diagnoses.name: Alcoholic cirrhosis of liver with ascites
diagnoses.evidence_span: alcoholic cirrhosis of the liver with ascites

diagnoses.name: Secondary esophageal varices without bleeding
diagnoses.evidence_span: Secondary esophageal varices without active bleeding but at risk for hemorrhage

diagnoses.name: Portal hypertension
diagnoses.evidence_span: alcoholic cirrhosis with associated portal hypertension

diagnoses.name: Nicotine dependence, cigarettes
diagnoses.evidence_span: long-standing nicotine dependence with cigarette use

diagnoses.name: Body mass index 23.0-23.9, adult
diagnoses.evidence_span: Body mass index is 23.5, which falls within the normal range

diagnoses.name: Hepatitis C without hepatic coma
diagnoses.evidence_span: hepatitis C infection without hepatic coma

diagnoses.name: Portal vein thrombosis
diagnoses.evidence_span: Portal vein thrombosis was identified on prior imaging

diagnoses.name: Severe protein-calorie malnutrition
diagnoses.evidence_span: severe protein-calorie malnutrition given his liver disease and poor intake

medications.name: Sodium chloride
medications.evidence_span: IV fluids including iso-osmotic sodium chloride

medications.name: Potassium chloride
medications.evidence_span: Electrolyte repletion was provided with potassium chloride 40 mEq

medications.name: Magnesium sulfate
medications.evidence_span: magnesium sulfate (both 2 gm and 4 gm doses) via IV route

medications.name: Heparin
medications.evidence_span: Heparin 5000 units was given subcutaneously for thromboembolism prophylaxis

medications.name: Pantoprazole
medications.evidence_span: pantoprazole and famotidine for acid suppression

medications.name: Famotidine
medications.evidence_span: pantoprazole and famotidine for acid suppression

medications.name: Bisacodyl
medications.evidence_span: bisacodyl (both 10 mg PO and 10 mg PR) for bowel motility

medications.name: Furosemide
medications.evidence_span: Diuresis was managed with furosemide 20 mg IV given the ascites

medications.name: Hydromorphone
medications.evidence_span: hydromorphone 0.25-0.5 mg IV titrated as needed for comfort

medications.name: Ondansetron
medications.evidence_span: Ondansetron 4 mg IV as needed for nausea
